data.title: Brother Machi closed all his Bitcoin long positions one hour ago, and currently holds 6,800 ETH in his Ethereum long positions.
data.description: According to Hyperbot data, Huang Licheng's Bitcoin long positions were all closed one hour ago, and his HYPE long positions were also all closed this morning. He currently holds a 25x leveraged Ethereum long position of 6,800 ETH, with a position value of $14.337 million, a floating profit of $306,000, and a liquidation price of $2,039.

data.title: Ministry of Public Security: Li Xiong, a core member of Chen Zhi's criminal gang, has been extradited from Cambodia back to China.
data.description: A working group dispatched by the Ministry of Public Security successfully extradited Li Xiong, a core member of Chen Zhi's criminal gang, from Phnom Penh, Cambodia, back to China. This marks another significant achievement in law enforcement cooperation between China and Cambodia. Investigations revealed that Li Xiong was formerly the chairman of Huiwang Group, a subsidiary of the Prince Group, and is suspected of multiple crimes, including operating casinos, fraud, illegal business operations, and concealing criminal proceeds. Currently, Li Xiong has been placed under coercive measures in accordance with the law, and the relevant cases are under further investigation. A relevant official from the Ministry of Public Security stated that several key members of Chen Zhi's criminal gang have been apprehended, and the public security organs will continue to intensify their efforts to resolutely bring fugitives to justice. (Beijing News)

data.title: Hyperbot Data Reveals Huang Licheng's Bitcoin and HYPE Positions Closed
data.description: Hyperbot data indicates that Huang Licheng, also known as Machi Big Brother, has closed all his Bitcoin long positions. According to ChainCatcher, his HYPE long positions were also closed this morning. Currently, he holds a 25x leveraged Ethereum long position with 6,800 ETH, valued at $14.337 million, with an unrealized profit of $306,000 and a liquidation price of $2,039.

data.title: Tech Stocks Rebound as Meta and Nvidia Lead Gains
data.description: Meta and Nvidia spearheaded a recovery in the U.S. tech sector's 'Magnificent Seven,' achieving gains of 6.67% and 5.59%, respectively. According to NS3.AI, other major tech companies, including Google, Tesla, Amazon, Microsoft, and Apple, also experienced increases, with their stock prices rising between 2.9% and 5.14%.

data.title: MakerDAO Co-Founder Adjusts Oil and Stock Positions Amid Market Shifts
data.description:
On April 1, recent monitoring by Hyperinsight revealed that MakerDAO co-founder Rune has partially reduced long positions in WTIOIL (WTI crude oil). According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the balance between oil and U.S. stock index positions is becoming more stable.

Currently, the address holds approximately $8.5 million in long oil positions, including WTI and Brent crude oil, and around $6.3 million in short U.S. stock index positions, covering the Nasdaq 100 and S&P 500, with a total holding exceeding $14.8 million. As of the time of reporting, the whale has not further reduced its positions today.

Over the past week, geopolitical conflicts have intensified, resulting in a profit of over $1.4 million for the portfolio. However, today's signals of a ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran have boosted market sentiment, leading to a decline in oil prices and a rise in U.S. stock indices. This has temporarily pressured the stagflation trading logic, causing the address to give back approximately $600,000 in profits.

data.title: BitMart contracts will list AMGNONUSDT, COFONUSDT, and ADIONUSDT.
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch perpetual contracts for AMGNONUSDT, COFONUSDT, and ADIONUSDT on April 1, 2026 at 16:00 (UTC+8), supporting leverage up to 20x.

data.title: US tech giants rebounded across the board, with Meta and Nvidia leading the gains, each rising over 5%.
data.description: Boosted by a significant easing of geopolitical risks between the US and Iran, all stocks related to the "Magnificent 7" of US tech giants rebounded today. According to Bitget market data, Meta and Nvidia led the gains, rising 6.67% and 5.59% respectively, while Google, Tesla, Amazon, Microsoft, and Apple all rose between 2.9% and 5.14%. On a macro level, the easing of geopolitical tensions has effectively reduced global risk premiums, prompting funds to flow back into high-beta growth assets. It is understood that Bitget's UEX exchange now supports trading in the aforementioned "Magnificent 7" US stock tokens and contracts, aiming to provide users with a one-stop cross-asset allocation and risk hedging tool.

data.title: SIREN Market Maker Executes Buyback Strategy with 500,000 SIREN Tokens
data.description: A SIREN market maker address recently executed a buyback of 500,000 SIREN tokens, spending 144,000 USDT at a price of $0.288 per token. According to NS3.AI, this transaction occurred half an hour ago. Previously, the same address had sold the same amount of SIREN tokens in the first half of the previous month at a price of $0.947, generating 473,000 USDT from the sale.

data.title: Jamie Dimon Advocates for Stronger Stance Against Iran
data.description: Morgan Stanley Chairman and CEO Jamie Dimon has made striking hawkish remarks, openly defending military action and criticizing Iran's actions over the past 45 years. According to Odaily, Dimon questioned why the Western world has tolerated Iran's behavior for so long, emphasizing that eliminating the Iranian threat is far more significant than short-term market performance. Dimon stated, "Allowing those individuals to control the Strait of Hormuz and fund all these proxy wars, why has the Western world endured these proxy wars for 45 years? I find it somewhat difficult to understand, and I truly hope for a positive outcome, hoping we can somehow achieve lasting peace in the Middle East."

data.title: JPMorgan Chase CEO makes startlingly hawkish remarks: Strongly supports the war with Iran, stating its importance far outweighs short-term stock market performance.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase Chairman and CEO Jamie Dimon made startlingly hawkish remarks, publicly defending the war and stating that Iran has been "doing bad things for 45 years," questioning "why the West has tolerated it for so long." In his view, successfully eliminating the Iranian threat is "far more important than short-term market performance." Dimon said, "I find it hard to understand why the West has tolerated these proxy wars for 45 years, letting those people control the Strait of Hormuz and funding all these proxy wars. I really hope for a good outcome, and I hope we can achieve lasting peace in the Middle East in some way." (Axios)

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $118 million yesterday, with BlackRock's IBIT leading the way with a net inflow of $98.4218 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $118 million yesterday (March 31, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF (IBIT) saw the largest single-day net inflow of $98.4218 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $63.204 billion. The Fidelity ETF (FBTC) followed with a net inflow of $16.2436 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.032 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $87.46 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.4%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $56.122 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $31.1684 million yesterday, with BlackRock's ETHA leading the way with a net inflow of $24.7038 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $31.1684 million yesterday (March 31, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF ETHA saw the largest single-day net inflow of $24.7038 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.642 billion. The 21Shares ETF TETH followed with a net inflow of $2.617 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $18.1844 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $11.978 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.71%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $11.559 billion.

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin is approaching the "buy zone" but has not yet shown typical bottoming signals.
data.description: While Bitcoin's current price is gradually approaching its historical "buy zone," on-chain data indicates that the market has not yet shown typical bottoming signals. Data shows that the spot price of Bitcoin is approximately $68,000, while the average holding cost across the network is approximately $54,000, representing a premium of about 21%, meaning that most holders are still in a profitable position. Historically, whether it was the 2020 pandemic-induced crash or the 2022 bear market bottom, Bitcoin has fallen below its realized price, resulting in a network-wide unrealized loss and thus forming a strong buy zone. However, the current market has not yet reached this "overall loss" stage. For Bitcoin to fall back to its realized price, it needs to drop further to approximately $54,000, implying a downside potential of about 20%. It is worth noting, however, that this premium has narrowed rapidly. At the end of 2024, when Bitcoin's price was above $119,000, its premium relative to the realized price was as high as approximately 120%, while it has now compressed to 21%, representing one of the fastest convergences in recent years. Furthermore, on-chain indicators also show that the market has not yet completed a sufficient adjustment. For example, the Coinbase premium index has turned negative, reflecting weakening institutional demand in the US. Nevertheless, the current $65,000 to $70,000 range has remained stable despite multiple macroeconomic shocks, and the over $1 billion in ETF inflows in March indicate continued buying support. Overall, Bitcoin is gradually approaching its potential bottom range, but has not yet experienced the historically typical "market clearing" process, and short-term uncertainty remains. (CoinDesk)

data.title: PolyMarket's Revenue Ranks Seventh Among Crypto Protocols
data.description: On April 1, PolyMarket's daily revenue reached $550,000, ranking seventh among crypto protocols, according to BlockBeats. Previously, PolyMarket announced a new fee structure starting March 30, imposing Taker fees on nearly all trading categories for the first time. The new structure features variable rates, with peak fees for cryptocurrency-related contracts reaching up to 1.8%. Actual fees vary based on share prices and market dynamics. Lower tiered rates apply to sports, finance, politics, culture, weather, and general categories, while peak rates for certain economic predictions are higher, around 1.5%.

data.title: U.S. Court Halts White House Renovation Pending Congressional Approval
data.description: A federal judge in the United States has ordered the Trump administration to pause the renovation project of the White House banquet hall until congressional authorization is obtained. According to RTHK, Judge Leon of the Federal District Court for the District of Columbia approved a preliminary injunction request on Tuesday, filed by the National Trust for Historic Preservation. The judge emphasized that while U.S. President Donald Trump manages the White House, he does not own it. He further stated that Trump's claim that Congress had authorized him to proceed with the renovation of the East Wing banquet hall using private funds was unfounded, as no regulations grant the president the powers he asserted. The preliminary injunction will delay the project for 14 days, during which the Trump administration may appeal the decision.

data.title: Polygon Achieves Record Stablecoin Transactions Amid Network Growth
data.description: Polygon founder Sandeep Nailwal announced on the X platform that the network recorded 159.9 million stablecoin transactions last week, marking a historic high. According to Odaily, key metrics such as stablecoin transaction volume and active addresses on the Polygon network have also increased, indicating the formation of a 'flywheel effect' in network growth. Additionally, the Polygon PoS network has reached 100,000 checkpoints, demonstrating continued expansion in network usage. Nailwal emphasized that despite the resurgence of the 'crypto is dead' narrative, teams that persist in development often create valuable products during market cycles. He stated that Polygon is accelerating efforts to build the future of on-chain payments.

data.title: Copper Prices Rise Over 1% Following Trump's Comments on Middle East Conflict
data.description: Copper prices have increased by more than 1% after U.S. President Donald Trump suggested that the war in the Middle East could conclude within two to three weeks. According to Jin10, Trump's remarks have sparked a rebound in risk assets, which had previously been heavily impacted by global growth concerns. In March, base metals, excluding aluminum, faced significant downward pressure due to Middle Eastern hostilities disrupting commodity supplies and posing inflationary threats to the global economy. Although Trump's latest timeline is not definitive, his comments have contributed to copper's recovery after a nearly 8% drop last month. Copper had a strong start to the year, reaching a record high of over $14,500 per ton in January.

data.title: Polygon founder: On-chain stablecoin transaction volume on Polygon reached a record high of nearly 160 million transactions last week.
data.description: Polygon founder Sandeep Nailwal stated in an article on the X platform that Polygon's stablecoin transaction volume reached 159.9 million transactions last week, a record high. Simultaneously, key metrics such as on-chain stablecoin transaction volume and active addresses all increased, indicating a "flywheel effect" of network growth is forming. Furthermore, the number of checkpoints on the Polygon PoS network has reached 100,000, demonstrating continued expansion of network usage. Nailwal added that amidst the resurgence of the "crypto is dead" narrative, teams that continuously build their systems often create valuable products during the cycle, and stated that Polygon is accelerating the construction of the future of on-chain payments.

data.title: Nano Labs announced its financial results for the second half of 2025: holding 126,662 BNB and pledging 3,338 BNB.
data.description: Nano Labs, a Nasdaq-listed digital asset treasury company, released its financial results for the second half of 2025, disclosing net revenue of RMB 18.7 million. As of December 31, 2025, it held 126,662 BNB with 3,338 BNB as collateral. The company stated it will further enhance its strategic reserves of crypto assets. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Half an hour ago, a certain on-chain address spent 144,000 USDT to buy back 500,000 SIREN tokens.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, a SIREN "market maker" on-chain address spent 144,000 USDT to buy back 500,000 SIREN tokens half an hour ago at a price of $0.288. These 500,000 SIREN tokens were sold at $0.947 per coin for 473,000 USDT in the previous two weeks. After today's price drop, the address controlling the SIREN market currently holds 645 million SIREN tokens, worth $155 million, compared to $1.44 billion a week ago.
